verses.text: Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawlna hangin hong kipia ding nuntakna thu a gen dingin Pasian' deihna tawh Khrih Jesuh' sawltak nasep a sem dingin a hong kisawl keimah Paul in
Ka it ka ta Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian leh i Topa Khrih Jesuh in dikna, hehpihna, leh nopsaknathupha nang tungah hong tungsak ta hen.
A sun a zanin ka thungetna-ah nang ka hong phawk tawntung a, ka pu ka pate' sep mah bangin kisuan'na lungsim om hetloin a na ka sep Pasian tungah ka lungdamna ka ko hi
Na khitui luan'nate phawk ka hih manin ka lung a damtheihna dingin nang tawh kimu nuamin a sun a zanin ka ngaihsun tawntung hi
Na pi Lois leh na nu Eunis in a neih upna bangte pawl mah, lungsim takpi tawh na upna thu ka phawk a, tu-in zong nang sungah tua bang upna om hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi
Tua ahih manin nang tungah ka khut nga-in thu ka hong ngetsak lai-in nangma tungah Pasian in hong piak siamna na sosuahna dingin ka hong phawksak hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite tungah meidawina lungsim hong guan'lo a, thahatna, ki-itna, pumpi ki-ukzawhna lungsim hong guan' hizaw hi

Tua ahih manin i Topa' thu genna ding thu-ah ahi a, ama thu hangin thong a kia keima thu-ah ahi zongin maizum het kei in. Pasian in nangma tungah thahatna hong pia ahih mah bangin Lungdamna Thu hangin thuakna-ah zong a thuaknuam hizaw in

Eite' sepzawhna hang hiloin ama ngimnasa bang leh a dikna hangin Pasian in eite hong honkhia-in ama mi dingin a hong sam hi. Pasian in leitung a pian'ma pekin Khrih Jesuh tung tawnin tua dikna a hong piak hi a
tuhun ciangin eite hong Honpa Khrih Jesuh tung tawnin a dikna hong langsak ta hi. Tua Jesuh in sihna beisak a, lungdamna thu hangin sih nawnlohna thu a hong kilangsak hi
Hih a thak Lungdamna Thu hilhin a taangko ding leh sawltak na a sem dingin kei a hong kikoih ahi hi
Tua ahih manin hih bangteng a thuak ka hi hi. Ahi zongin ka uppa ka thei a, ama tungah ka apte tua Ni dong hong kepsakzo ding hi, ci-in thei ka hih manin ka maizum het kei hi
Keima tung panin na zaksa a man thute zui in la, Khrih Jesuh tawh i kipawlna hangin i ngah upna leh itna thu-ah kiptakin om in
Eite sungah a hong teng Kha Siangtho in a hong ap thuhoihte limtakin kem in
Na theihsa bangin Asia gamsunga om mi khempeuh in kei hong nusia uh a, tuate lakah Figelas leh Hermogenes-te zong kihel uh hi
Onesiforas in tamveipi kei hong lungnuamsak ahih manin Pasian in a innkuan bupun hehpihna thupha pia ta hen. Ka thongkiatna hangin amah maizumlo a
Rom khua hong tun' ciangin kei hong muh matengin hong zong pah hi
Topa in tua Ni ciangin ama tungah hehpihna thupha pia ta hen. Efesa khua-ah ka omlai-in nakpi takin kei a hong huhnate khempeuh na theihsa ahi hi.
